arts.ttl: FC Porto vs Manchester United – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Manchester United visit FC Porto in the Europa League tonight, in what promises to be an entertaining clash in Portugal. With Erik ten Hag’s job security in the balance, the result of this game could either be the catalyst for positive change or push the Dutchman closer towards the exit door. arts.ttl: I played against Manchester United in Europe, this is what FC Porto need to do to beat them
arts.sum: Manchester United will go in search of their first Europa League win against FC Porto in a crucial week for the club after a disappointing start to the season

arts.ttl: Harry Maguire OUT of England squad as star handed recall after SEVEN YEARS
arts.sum: Lee Carsley is set to name his England squad for the upcoming UEFA Nations League matches against Greece and Finland, with Manchester United's Maguire set to miss out

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag's 21 Man Utd signings rated and slated as recruitment issues slammed
arts.sum: Erik ten Hag has signed 21 new players since taking over as Manchester United manager, and the club's recruitment since his arrival has come under plenty of scrutiny

arts.ttl: Antony details Manchester United stadium chat with Casemiro after getting 'quite sad'
arts.sum: The Brazilian duo are part of United's travelling squad for their trip to Porto this evening in the Europa League

arts.ttl: Report: What members of Manchester United’s hierarchy think about the standard of Erik ten Hag's training
Man Utd warned of a lack of leadership and told Erik ten Hag crisis will only worsen
arts.sum: Man Utd take on Porto in the Europa League tonight, in a game under-fire boss Erik ten Hag cannot afford to lose, with Dwight Yorke claiming a lack of character and leadership at the club will only deepen their crisis

arts.ttl: Mason Mount injured again; Erik ten Hag confirms Porto availability
arts.sum: Mount's social media post, which was accompanied by a smiling selfie just hours after the defeat, left a handful of United fans frustrated, and supporters have since been surprised by news that the midfielder also picked up a knock during the game. Erik ten Hag has confirmed Mason Mount will miss Manchester United's Europa League clash with Porto on Thursday due to another injury issue.

arts.ttl: Erik ten Hag calls on Man Utd stars to step up and 'take responsibility' to end crisis
arts.sum: Man Utd are mired in crisis after a woeful start to the season, with under-pressure boss Erik ten Hag calling on his big players to step up and deliver a statement performance and win over Porto
